title: Delivery evidence (API Quality v1)
description: Normative JSON shape for delivery_hash commitment; must match oracle-qa DeliveryEvidence deserialization.
Core keys are evaluated; additional keys are ignored by oracle-qa v1.

response_body.description: Parsed JSON value (object, array, string, number, boolean, or null).

response_headers.description: Optional; not used in core v1 checks.
